---
title: Années 1980
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807787/Template_7_yj34du.png
description: Stars des années 1980
categories: [fanart]
date: 2026-01-04
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807787/Template_7_yj34du.png)
